faq.title: Answers to common questions
faq.subtitle: We answer the most common questions about our LLM Apps services and how they can transform your business.
faq.certDescription: At Cleverit we have the certification of
faq.certName: Microsoft Solutions Partner | Digital & App Innovation
faq.certFooter: Your business in the hands of a Microsoft-recognized specialist.
faq.certFeature1: Modernize and migrate your enterprise applications to the cloud
faq.certFeature2: Boost your developers' productivity with Microsoft Azure

question1.a: LLM Apps are intelligent applications that use large language models to process, analyze and generate content naturally. They allow companies to automate complex communication and data analysis tasks.

question2.q: What are the main features of LLMApps?
question2.a: Our LLM Apps include advanced natural language processing, integration with existing databases, customization according to your industry, automatic scalability and intuitive interfaces for non-technical users.

question3.q: Is my data secure when using LLM Apps?
question3.a: Absolutely. We implement end-to-end encryption, comply with international security standards such as ISO 27001, and your data is never shared with third parties. Additionally, we offer on-premise deployment options for maximum security.

question4.q: What differentiates your LLM Apps from other AI solutions?
question4.a: We specialize in customized solutions for each business, offer complete integration with existing systems, Spanish support, and a consultative approach that ensures AI truly solves your specific problems.

question5.q: What is the cost of developing an LLM App?
question5.a: The cost varies depending on complexity and specific features. We offer plans starting at $2,000 USD per month for basic solutions, up to customized enterprise projects. Contact us for a detailed quote.

question6.q: What type of support do you offer after launch?
question6.a: We provide 24/7 technical support, regular model updates, performance monitoring, team training, and continuous improvements based on actual use of your application.

useCases.title: Real AI Use Cases
useCases.subtitle: Discover how different industries are transforming their operations with LLM Apps and custom AI solutions.
useCases.ctaSubtitle: Contact us and discover how we can create a custom solution for your industry.
useCases.detailCtaSubtitle: Let's talk about how we can adapt this solution to your business specific needs.

case1.title: Production Insight
case1.excerpt: Optimization of production lines through real-time AI analysis, enabling informed decisions and waste reduction.
case1.fullContent: In the modern manufacturing industry, the ability to make informed decisions in real-time is essential to maintain competitiveness. Production Insight is an AI solution that transforms production data into actionable insights, allowing plant managers to optimize operations, reduce waste and maximize efficiency.
case1.challenge: Manufacturing plants generate enormous amounts of data from sensors, machines and processes, but lack tools to analyze them effectively in real-time. Managers need immediate answers about line performance, failure prediction and optimization opportunities, but traditional systems require manual analysis that takes days or weeks.
case1.solution: Production Insight uses LLM Apps to connect directly to production systems, SCADA databases and IoT sensors. The AI automatically processes all data in real-time, allowing managers to ask questions in natural language like 'Which line has the most waste today?' or 'When should I schedule maintenance for machine X?' and receive instant answers with visualizations.
features: Machine failure prediction with machine learning
Integration with existing ERP and MES systems
case1.results: Companies that implement Production Insight report a 25-30% reduction in waste, a 15-20% increase in production efficiency and a 40% decrease in unplanned downtime. Managers make faster and data-driven decisions, resulting in significant savings and better product quality.

case2.title: Mining Intelligence
case2.excerpt: Intelligent management of mining operations with predictive safety analysis, resource optimization and real-time environmental monitoring.
case2.fullContent: The mining industry faces unique challenges in terms of safety, operational efficiency and environmental compliance. Mining Intelligence is an AI platform specifically designed for mining operations that transforms complex data from multiple sources into actionable information to improve safety, optimize extraction and ensure regulatory compliance.
case2.challenge: Mining operations generate data from multiple sources: geological sensors, heavy equipment, environmental monitoring, safety reports and logistics systems. Mine managers need to consolidate all this information to make critical decisions about safety, productivity and compliance, but existing systems are fragmented and require extensive manual analysis.
case2.solution: Mining Intelligence integrates data from all operational sources into a unified AI platform. Supervisors can query in natural language about safety conditions, equipment performance, production projections or environmental impact. The AI provides predictive analysis to prevent accidents, optimize transport routes and anticipate maintenance problems.
features: Predictive safety monitoring and accident prevention
AI-assisted geological analysis for better extraction
Continuous environmental monitoring and compliance alerts
Predictive maintenance management for heavy machinery
Automated production reports and operational KPIs
case2.results: Mining operations that adopt Mining Intelligence experience a 35% reduction in safety incidents, a 20% increase in extraction productivity and a 30% decrease in maintenance costs. The platform also helps comply with environmental regulations through continuous monitoring and automated reporting.

case3.title: Development Metrics
case3.excerpt: Advanced analysis of development team productivity with code metrics, delivery velocity and bottleneck prediction.
case3.fullContent: Modern software development teams generate a massive amount of data through commits, pull requests, issues, and CI/CD metrics. Development Metrics is an AI solution that converts this data into actionable insights for technical leaders, allowing them to improve team productivity, identify bottlenecks and optimize development processes.
case3.challenge: CTOs and engineering leaders need visibility into their teams' actual productivity, code quality, and obstacles that slow delivery. However, data is scattered across multiple tools (GitHub, Jira, Jenkins, etc.) and manually analyzing this information consumes valuable time. Additionally, traditional metrics like lines of code don't reflect true productivity.
case3.solution: Development Metrics integrates with GitHub, GitLab, Jira, and other development tools to consolidate all data into a unified platform. The AI analyzes work patterns, code quality, delivery speed and team collaboration. Leaders can ask 'Where are the bottlenecks in the current sprint?' or 'Which developers need support?' and receive detailed analysis with actionable recommendations.
features: Development velocity and delivery cycle analysis
Automatic detection of bottlenecks and blockers
Code quality metrics and technical debt
Delivery date prediction based on historical velocity
Custom dashboards for different technical roles
case3.results: Teams that implement Development Metrics report a 30% increase in delivery velocity, a 25% reduction in production bugs and a 40% improvement in estimation accuracy. Technical leaders gain clear visibility into team health and can intervene proactively before issues affect delivery.
